title: Resolution Interposing No Objection on the Posting of Election Campaign or Propaganda and Other Advertising Materials on Lamp Posts and Electric Posts Within the Municipality of Los Baños for the Period of February to May 2022. (AUTHOR (S) : Councilor(s) Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Rodora P. Perez-loares, 02/08/2022)
